Chinese definition: 內容太艱澀聽不懂，或者指語言不通。
English Definition: A duck listening to thunder. Content too abstruse to understand; a language barrier; talking at cross-purposes.

Chinese definition: 正襟危坐，坐着不動的姿勢。
English Definition: Sitting perfectly upright with stiff posture; to sit rigidly bolt upright.

Chinese definition: 從頭開始（細說）。
English Definition: To explain from the very beginning; to go through step by step from the start.

Chinese definition: 一放屁就要到嘴裏，嘲笑性急的人。
English Definition: Lit. 'a fart goes straight to the mouth'. Mocking someone who is overly impatient or impulsive.

Chinese definition: 很生氣，大聲講粗話罵人的狀態。
English Definition: Very angry, swearing and cursing loudly; in a state of furious profanity.

Chinese definition: （探訪親友）逗留沒一會就說要走。相當於廣州話的“滾水熝腳”。
English Definition: Lit. 'burning embers scorching the feet'. Leaving after only a brief visit; like a cat on a hot tin roof. Equivalent to Cantonese 滾水熝腳.

Chinese definition: 三更半夜（農村生活只有雞啼，沒有打更）。
English Definition: The dead of night (since village life only had crowing roosters, not night watchmen).

Chinese definition: 青蛙懷着卵子的樣子。比喻年紀不大的小孩背着自己的弟妹，又作三斤孭（bā）〔背〕兩斤。
English Definition: A frog carrying eggs in its body; describes a small child carrying a younger sibling on their back. Also: 三斤孭兩斤.

Chinese definition: 字面是該死的不死。但一般是指碰巧（遇到不好的事情）。
English Definition: Lit. 'the one who should die doesn't'. Idiom meaning: 'as luck would have it' (in a bad situation); to happen to...

Chinese definition: 把禾稈摟住上去閣樓存放，動作通常要很快。用來比喻人狼吞虎嚥的窘態。
English Definition: Bundling rice stalks to carry them up to the loft – a hurried action. Describes someone wolfing down food greedily.

Chinese definition: 字面是幫別人挽鞋子。比喻比別人差勁很多。又作摎人擎腳。
English Definition: Lit. 'to help someone carry their shoes'. Far inferior to the other person; not even fit to carry their shoes. Also 摎人擎腳.

Chinese definition: 字面是幫別人承托着腳。比喻比別人差勁很多。又作摎人扠鞋。
English Definition: Lit. 'to support someone's feet'. Far inferior to the other person. Also 摎人扠鞋.

Chinese definition: 說話大聲，沒教養。
English Definition: Lit. 'thunder splitting rocks'. Talking too loudly; having no manners.

Chinese definition: 字面是很想他死。引申為拿他沒辦法。
English Definition: Lit. 'wish he would just die'. Extended meaning: there's nothing you can do about him; he's impossible to deal with.

Chinese definition: 不知道輕重。
English Definition: Not knowing what is important or not; lacking judgement about priorities.

Chinese definition: 不知天高地厚。
English Definition: Not knowing one's place; ignorant of the natural order; not knowing one's limits.

Chinese definition: 不過不失，沒有什麼優點或缺點。
English Definition: Neither good nor bad; mediocre; not particularly outstanding or flawed.

Chinese definition: 貓吃掉你的水稻了（貓是不會這樣做的）。嘲笑人無故生氣。
English Definition: Lit. 'a cat ate your rice crops' (which never happens). Mocking someone for getting angry over nothing.

Chinese definition: 蚊子叮咬牛角。比喻沒感覺，冥頑不靈。
English Definition: Lit. 'a mosquito biting an ox horn'. The ox feels nothing; describes someone who is insensitive or impervious.

Chinese definition: 字面是眼睛比嘴巴大。笑人以為自己食量很大，結果卻吃不下。
English Definition: Eyes bigger than the stomach. Overestimating one's appetite; thinking you can eat more than you actually can.

Chinese definition: 語言不通，相當於廣州話“雞同鴨講”。
English Definition: A goose and a duck talking. Complete communication breakdown; mutual incomprehension. Equivalent to Cantonese 雞同鴨講.

Chinese definition: 據說大蟒蛇死後，後腳會從身體伸出來。比喻水落石出，真相大白。
English Definition: Lit. 'when a snake dies, its legs appear'. The truth comes out eventually; the hidden facts are revealed.

Chinese definition: 詈語，字面是還沒輪到你死。罵人該死。
English Definition: A curse: 'it's not even your turn to die yet'. Means: you deserve to die (you wretched person).

Chinese definition: 四隻腳抓着天空。四腳朝天的意思。
English Definition: Four limbs reaching up to the sky; lying flat on one's back with all four limbs up.

Chinese definition: 塊頭很大。例：有冇搞錯？大嫲牯隻還愛阿媽孭〔有沒有搞錯？長那麼大了還要媽媽背着〕。
English Definition: A very large and bulky build. E.g. 'How can someone that big still want to be carried by their mother?'

Chinese definition: 一年到頭。
English Definition: All year round; from one year's beginning to its end.

Chinese definition: 一天到晚（客家話把詞形改變了一下）。 【5】四字熟語·非重疊結構·短句 二維碼5
English Definition: All day long; from morning to night (Hakka reshapes the idiom slightly).

Chinese definition: 本指帶小豬的母豬，笑稱哺乳期的女人胃口大。
English Definition: A nursing sow carrying piglets. Humorously describes a breastfeeding woman with a big appetite.

Chinese definition: 獨棟的房子。
English Definition: A standalone detached house.

Chinese definition: 隱形富豪。“暗點”是不起眼的意思。
English Definition: A hidden wealthy person; a person of invisible wealth. 暗點 = inconspicuous.

Chinese definition: 花花綠綠，又作花厘斗燦。這個詞碧唸bìt。
English Definition: Brightly multi-coloured; gaudy and colourful. Also 花厘斗燦. Note: 碧 is pronounced bìt.

Chinese definition: 花花綠綠，又作花厘碧綠。
English Definition: Brightly multi-coloured; gaudy and colourful. Also 花厘碧綠.

Chinese definition: 絕子絕孫。罵人的話。
English Definition: May your lineage end; may you have no descendants. A curse.

Chinese definition: 字面是蝦和蟹，指蝦兵蟹將。意思是小蘿蔔頭，不重要的人物。
English Definition: Lit. 'shrimps and old crabs'. Shrimp soldiers and crab generals; minor, unimportant figures.

Chinese definition: 外表、賣相不好看。
English Definition: Not good-looking; having an unattractive appearance.

Chinese definition: 身上沒有任何衣服，一絲不掛。
English Definition: Not a single thread; completely naked; not a stitch of clothing.

Chinese definition: 液體滿到容器邊上。
English Definition: Liquid so full it is brimming over the rim of the container.

Chinese definition: 字面是神仙的精液。笑稱別人自作聰明，自以為是神仙的後代。
English Definition: Lit. 'immortal's semen'. Mockingly: acting as if you are descended from a deity; self-important and smug.

Chinese definition: 耀眼的金黃色，一般指動物的毛或者鳥的羽毛。
English Definition: Dazzling golden-yellow colour, usually of an animal's coat or a bird's feathers.

Chinese definition: 無緣無故，沒有一點理由。
English Definition: Without any reason or cause whatsoever; out of the blue.

Chinese definition: 圓圓的（不好看，尤其指臉型）。 【6】四字熟語·非重疊結構·並列、定中 二維碼6
English Definition: Perfectly round (unattractive) – especially of a round face.

Chinese definition: 矮小略帶胖。
English Definition: Short and slightly plump; stocky.

Chinese definition: 環境很黑。
English Definition: Very dark environment.

Chinese definition: 刺眼。
English Definition: Dazzlingly bright; causing the eyes to squint.

Chinese definition: 很綠或者很藍色。一般指湖水或海水。
English Definition: Very green or very blue; usually of lake or sea water.

Chinese definition: 形狀不規則，歪里歪相的。
English Definition: Irregular in shape; lopsided and crooked.

Chinese definition: 滿地或者滿身都是黏糊糊的東西。
English Definition: Covered all over in sticky, gooey stuff (on the floor or on one's body).

Chinese definition: 腿太長，高得不好看。
English Definition: Legs far too long; ungainly tall legs.

Chinese definition: 很油膩或者很胖。
English Definition: Very greasy or very fat.

Chinese definition: （身材）很瘦。
English Definition: Very thin and skinny (of a person's figure).

Chinese definition: 指稀飯很稀沒有米粒，像水一樣。
English Definition: Congee so thin and watery it is like plain water with no rice grains.

Chinese definition: 皮膚很黑而不好看。又作烏臊滴嗒。
English Definition: Very dark skin of an unattractive shade. Also 烏臊滴嗒.

Chinese definition: 皮膚很黑而覺得髒。
English Definition: Very dark skin that looks dirty.

Chinese definition: 皮膚很黑而不好看。又作烏厘撈臊。 【7】四字熟語·非重疊結構·擬聲狀補 二維碼7
English Definition: Very dark skin of an unattractive shade. Also 烏厘撈臊.

Chinese definition: 撲來撲去。
English Definition: Flailing about; thrashing; kicking or flapping repeatedly.

Chinese definition: 很多障礙物。
English Definition: Many obstacles and obstructions in the way.

Chinese definition: 笑稱無所事事的人。
English Definition: Lit. 'idle corpse, idle flesh'. Mockingly describes someone who is doing nothing and just loafing around.

Chinese definition: （指小孩或動物）很會吃，大得很快。
English Definition: Eats well and grows fast (of a child or animal).

Chinese definition: 很理想，一切都在掌握中。
English Definition: Ideal and just as planned; everything under control.

Chinese definition: 羽翼已豐，不用靠別人。
English Definition: Can fly and jump; fully independent; no longer needing support from others.

Chinese definition: （因為生氣或者性格孤僻）不做聲。
English Definition: Not saying a word (due to sulking or being reserved by nature).

Chinese definition: 食物一點味道都沒有，又作冇味冇髓。
English Definition: Completely tasteless (of food). Also 冇味冇髓.

Chinese definition: 食物一點味道都沒有，又作冇鹽冇味。
English Definition: Completely tasteless (of food). Also 冇鹽冇味.

Chinese definition: 孤兒。
English Definition: Without father or mother; an orphan.

Chinese definition: 器物沒把柄供把持，引申為無從下手。
English Definition: No handle to grip; nothing to grab onto. Extended: no way to begin; no starting point.

Chinese definition: 打瞌睡，正在進入睡眠的狀態。
English Definition: Dozing off; in a drowsy state between waking and sleeping.

Chinese definition: 不禮貌地翻白眼看人。“反”讀陽平。
English Definition: Rolling eyes rudely at someone; giving someone an insolent look. (反 = level rising tone)

Chinese definition: 字面是“你的屍體和命”。但客家話通常嵌入動詞用來罵人，例如孩子想看電視，媽媽會說：“功課都吂〔沒〕做好，看惹屍看惹命。”表示生氣。
English Definition: Lit. 'your corpse and your life'. Used embedded in sentences as an intensifier expressing anger: e.g. 'Looking at 惹屍看惹命' = 'staring rudely at me in anger'.

Chinese definition: 食物非常韌，嚼不開。
English Definition: Extremely tough and chewy; impossible to bite through.

Chinese definition: 很多絲帶狀的東西。
English Definition: Full of thin stringy filaments; fibrous in texture.

Chinese definition: 拼命地爬，引申為很努力地幹活。
English Definition: Climbing desperately; extended: working very hard and struggling to get ahead.

Chinese definition: 大口大口（地吃）。
English Definition: Taking large bites; eating with big mouthfuls.

Chinese definition: （衣服上）圖案、花紋太誇張，不好看。
English Definition: (Of patterns on clothes) overly large and gaudy; too flamboyant.

Chinese definition: （幹活中）停手不幹活。 二維碼8 另外，這種句式還包括一種相當於普通話“越X越Y”的“緊X緊Y”，例如“緊坐緊冷、緊喊緊走、緊食緊肥、緊想緊惶（越想越怕）”等。這些詞彙能產性很強，不勝枚舉。其中X多為動詞，Y多為動詞或形容詞。 【8】四字熟語·對稱結構·ABAC
English Definition: Stopping hands and hooves; stopping in the middle of work; taking a break.

Chinese definition: 很緊張，趕時間的樣子。
English Definition: Very tense and hurried; rushing against time.

Chinese definition: 非常猴急。
English Definition: Extremely eager and impatient; extremely agitated.

Chinese definition: 非常可憐的樣子。
English Definition: Very pitiful; in a very sorry state.

Chinese definition: 每根樹枝。
English Definition: Every single branch and twig.

Chinese definition: 各種廚具。
English Definition: All kinds of pots and cooking utensils.

Chinese definition: 很多很多。
English Definition: Tens of thousands; an enormous number.

Chinese definition: 世世代代
English Definition: Generation after generation; from one generation to the next.

Chinese definition: 剩下的，不值錢或者不起眼的。
English Definition: The leftovers; unimportant, worthless odds and ends.

Chinese definition: 週圍一個圈。
English Definition: Surrounding in a complete circle.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，人聲鼎沸。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: a loud, bustling clamour of voices.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，咳嗽得很厲害。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: hacking, persistent coughing.

Chinese definition: 非常破爛的。
English Definition: Extremely broken down and falling apart.

Chinese definition: 胡亂混雜在一起。又作三撈四夾。
English Definition: Haphazardly mixed together. Also 三撈四夾.

Chinese definition: （蟲子）萬頭鑚動的樣子
English Definition: (Of worms etc.) wriggling and swarming all over.

Chinese definition: 做事情不爽快。又作拈燒鼻冷。
English Definition: Doing things in a slow and fussy manner; not decisive or efficient. Also 拈燒鼻冷.

Chinese definition: 爬上爬下，又作皮爬極蹶。
English Definition: Climbing up and down; scrambling around. Also 皮爬極蹶.

Chinese definition: 偷偷摸摸。
English Definition: Sneaking around; acting furtively and stealthily.

Chinese definition: 孤本，獨自一個（物件，不能說人）。
English Definition: One of a kind; a single solitary item (not used for people).

Chinese definition: 很多彎角，即廣州話所謂九曲十三彎。
English Definition: Full of bends and corners; winding and tortuous.

Chinese definition: 皮膚黑中帶紅（勞動人民的膚色）。
English Definition: Dark skin with a ruddy undertone (the complexion of a working person).

Chinese definition: 小孩的哭聲等讓人覺得煩的聲音。
English Definition: The whining or crying sound of a child that grates on the nerves.

Chinese definition: 扯來扯去。
English Definition: Pulling and tugging back and forth.

Chinese definition: （小孩頑皮）爬上爬下。 二維碼9 【9】四字熟語·對稱結構·AABB
English Definition: (Of naughty children) scrambling and climbing everywhere. Also 爬爬蹶蹶.

Chinese definition: 形容食物有點苦中帶甘。
English Definition: Describes food with a slightly bitter yet sweet aftertaste.

Chinese definition: 不停閃動。
English Definition: Flickering repeatedly; flashing on and off.

Chinese definition: 有點驕傲，又作大傲大傲。
English Definition: Slightly arrogant or conceited. Also 大傲大傲.

Chinese definition: 形容食物酸中帶甜，尤其是水果。
English Definition: Describes a sour-sweet flavour, especially of fruit.

Chinese definition: 形容一個人有點神經不正常，亂說話。
English Definition: Acting slightly unhinged or erratic; talking nonsensically.

Chinese definition: 有點害羞。
English Definition: Somewhat shy; a little bashful.

Chinese definition: 不停搖動。 二維碼10 以上的AABB普通話不說，廣州話也只說動詞性的，不說形容詞的。相比之下，形容詞的ABAB可以說是客家話比較特殊的結構，但在閩南語也有。 【10】四字熟語·對稱結構·ABAB
English Definition: Swaying repeatedly; shaking back and forth.

Chinese definition: 形容到處都是。
English Definition: Everywhere; in every corner and along every wall.

Chinese definition: 嘲笑別人說話有口音，或者說的話聽不到。
English Definition: Mockingly describing someone who speaks with a strange accent, or whose speech is inaudible.

Chinese definition: 以前農村的狗是吃屎的。屎太多就沒有吸引力了。比喻某種東西太多，吸引力大減。
English Definition: Lit. 'too much dung makes the dog full'. If something is too plentiful, it loses its appeal. Too much of a good thing.

Chinese definition: 幹活很久很疲勞的狀態。
English Definition: Bent at the waist and back from long hours of hard labour; exhausted posture.

Chinese definition: 紙扎的，不牢固。
English Definition: Made of paper and rice paste; flimsy and insubstantial; not solidly built.

Chinese definition: 嘴巴和鼻子都很難看。形容醜陋的長相。
English Definition: Both mouth and nose are unattractive; used to describe an ugly face.

Chinese definition: 屍體被豬狗撕開。罵人家死無葬身之地。
English Definition: Lit. 'dragged by pigs and torn apart by dogs'. A curse: may you have no proper burial.

Chinese definition: 自誇自己的功勞。
English Definition: To boast about one's own accomplishments; to blow one's own trumpet.

Chinese definition: 門戶都關起來了。
English Definition: With all doors and windows shut tight; completely closed up.

Chinese definition: 只吃飯不幹活。
English Definition: Loves eating but hates working; gluttonous and lazy.

Chinese definition: 本義是小孩學別人說話，也引申為說別人閒話。
English Definition: Lit. 'imitating mouth and nose'. Children mimicking others; extended: gossiping about people.

Chinese definition: 野生植物藤蔓亂長的狀態。
English Definition: Wild vines and creepers growing in a tangled mass.

Chinese definition: 很久沒有生火煮食的樣子。
English Definition: Cold wok and dead stove; a kitchen that has not been used to cook for a long time.

Chinese definition: 本義是肚腸都腐爛透了，但一般用來嘲笑人家放屁很臭。
English Definition: Lit. 'rotten intestines and decaying belly'. Originally a harsh insult; now usually used to tease someone about having very smelly flatulence.

Chinese definition: 形容生活艱苦。
English Definition: Lit. 'biting salt and sucking ginger'. Describes a life of poverty and hardship.

Chinese definition: 字面是捕蛇捉蛙，但用作比喻工作不專心，被其他瑣事浪費時間。
English Definition: Lit. 'catching snakes and killing frogs'. Describes someone who works distractedly, wasting time on irrelevant tasks instead of the main job.

Chinese definition: 做事情不爽快，又作拈拈捏捏。
English Definition: Handling hot items with one hand and cold with the other. Doing things in a slow, indecisive manner. Also 拈拈捏捏.

Chinese definition: 形容病重。
English Definition: Sprawled across the bed with sheets spread out. Describes someone who is seriously ill.

Chinese definition: （小孩）爬上爬下，又作爬蹶爬蹶。
English Definition: (Of children) climbing fences and scrambling up walls; monkeying around. Also 爬蹶爬蹶.

Chinese definition: 形容人懶惰得不願意動。
English Definition: Lit. 'dead snake and rotten frog'. Describes someone too lazy to even move.

Chinese definition: 好吃懶做。死食是貪吃，爛癱是表示很喜歡睡覺。
English Definition: Greedy and lazy; eating too much and lounging around. 死食 = greedy eater; 爛癱 = sleepy and listless.

Chinese definition: 拼命抓癢的樣子。
English Definition: Scratching frantically at an itch.

Chinese definition: 小偷行為。
English Definition: Stealing sweet potatoes and digging up taro; acts of petty theft.

Chinese definition: （竹子、棍子等）亂放亂疊。
English Definition: (Of bamboo or sticks) scattered about in disorder; piled every which way.

Chinese definition: 天昏地暗。
English Definition: Dark skies and dark ground; pitch darkness in every direction.

Chinese definition: 養虎為患。
English Definition: Lit. 'raising a snake to eat your chickens'. Nurturing something that will turn against you; raising a tiger.

Chinese definition: 很悠閒地幹活。“料”是同音字，玩樂的意思。
English Definition: Working in a relaxed, leisurely way; half-work, half-play. 料 = play.

Chinese definition: （老人）走路快要跌倒的姿勢。
English Definition: (Of an old person) walking in a precarious, tottering manner, about to fall.

Chinese definition: 手舞足蹈，或者手腳亂抓的樣子。
English Definition: Waving one's arms and kicking one's legs; flailing all limbs about.

Chinese definition: 不值錢的東西。
English Definition: Bits of copper and iron; worthless junk and trinkets.

Chinese definition: 一大清早。
English Definition: Very early in the morning; at the crack of dawn.

Chinese definition: 重複很多遍。
English Definition: Repeating something over and over; saying the same thing many times.

Chinese definition: 冬天接近過年的時候。
English Definition: The ninth and tenth months (winter); the cold season approaching the new year.

Chinese definition: 很多嫌棄的話。廣州話說嫌三嫌四。
English Definition: Full of complaints and objections; always finding fault. Cantonese says 嫌三嫌四.

Chinese definition: 四散東西。注意“四”唸陰平。
English Definition: Scattered in all directions. Note: 四 is read in level tone.

Chinese definition: 接近過年的半個月左右。
English Definition: The two weeks or so around Chinese New Year (the third and fourth weeks of the twelfth lunar month).

Chinese definition: 胡亂混合，又作撈撈夾夾。
English Definition: Haphazardly mixed and jumbled together. Also 撈撈夾夾.

Chinese definition: 一下子，臨時。
English Definition: In an instant; temporarily; at short notice.

Chinese definition: 很少、個別情況。
English Definition: Just one or two; a very small number; occasionally.

Chinese definition: 裝蒜，偽裝。 二維碼11 【11】四字熟語·對稱結構·ABA’B’
English Definition: Pretending; putting on an act; playing dumb.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，連續地倒下，又作bì lì bò lò。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: falling repeatedly in quick succession. Also bì lì bò lò.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，很零碎的意思。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: the sound of something breaking into many small pieces; fragmented.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，滴水、時鐘等的聲音。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: dripping water or a ticking clock.

Chinese definition: 多言得令人討厭（尤其是女人或者小孩子）。
English Definition: Talking incessantly in an annoying way (especially of women or children).

Chinese definition: 障礙物阻礙通道的狀態。例：凳仔愛兜好佢，唔好在廳中間勁勁徑徑〔凳子要放好，不要在廳中間造成阻礙〕。
English Definition: Things blocking a passageway. E.g. 'Put the stools away properly, don't let them block the middle of the hall.'

Chinese definition: 衣衣哦哦 口齒不清的狀態。例：佢中風之後講話衣衣哦哦。 很多棱角、轉彎，不靠看、不順暢，又作gĭt lĭt gŏk lŏk。 í í ó ó
English Definition: Full of corners and bends; not smooth or easy to navigate. Also激激惜惜.

Chinese definition: 胡亂混合在一起。
English Definition: All jumbled and mixed up together in a mess.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，搬動碗碟或玻璃器皿的聲音。例：吾老妹一早洗碗殸殸吭吭嘈醒厓〔我妹妹一早洗碗發出的聲音吵醒我〕。又作kín lín káng láng。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: the clattering sound of crockery or glassware being moved. Also 殸鈴吭朗.

Chinese definition: 走路不穩。
English Definition: Walking unsteadily; tottering along.

Chinese definition: 擬聲詞，漏水、小動物爬行等的聲音。又作細利唆囖。
English Definition: Onomatopoeia: the sound of dripping water or small creatures crawling. Also 細利唆囖.

Chinese definition: 瑟縮在一旁（不大方）。
English Definition: Huddled and shrinking timidly to one side; not at all outgoing.

Chinese definition: 蹦蹦跳跳。
English Definition: Bouncing and jumping about.

Chinese definition: 肚子飽脹，沒胃口的感覺。
English Definition: The overfull, bloated, queasy feeling when you have no appetite.

Chinese definition: （地方）很髒亂，（人）不整潔。
English Definition: (Of a place) very dirty and messy; (of a person) unkempt and sloppy.

Chinese definition: 幹活手腳爽快。
English Definition: Doing work with quick, nimble hands; working swiftly and efficiently.

Chinese definition: 時間很緊迫。
English Definition: Very pressed for time; urgently rushed.

Chinese definition: 全身濕透的窘態。
English Definition: Completely drenched from head to toe.

Chinese definition: （老人、小孩）走路不穩。
English Definition: (Of old people or small children) walking unsteadily.

Chinese definition: 衣服太寬不合身，或者地方太大沒有家具。
English Definition: Clothes too baggy and ill-fitting, or a space too large and empty of furniture.

Chinese definition: 快要脫落的樣子。
English Definition: On the verge of falling off; about to come loose.

Chinese definition: 幹活不爽快，又作拈拈捏捏、拈燒鼻冷。
English Definition: Working in a slow, sloppy manner. Also 拈拈捏捏, 拈燒鼻冷.

Chinese definition: 睡眼惺忪，沒有睡醒的樣子。
English Definition: Bleary-eyed and drowsy; not fully awake.

Chinese definition: 手腳擋着地方，造成障礙的樣子。
English Definition: Limbs getting in the way everywhere; creating obstructions.

Chinese definition: 因為吃得太飽而又不舒服的感覺。
English Definition: All over the place in the way; cluttering up the space.

Chinese definition: 很吝嗇，或者性格很怪很難對付。
English Definition: Extremely stingy; or very peculiar and hard to deal with.

Chinese definition: 愕然，迷茫的樣子。
English Definition: Stunned; bewildered; at a complete loss.

Chinese definition: 很粗魯，說話很大聲。
English Definition: Very rude; talking loudly and aggressively.

Chinese definition: 動作很慢。
English Definition: Moving extremely slowly; sluggish actions.

Chinese definition: 形容水滴個不停。
English Definition: Dripping water non-stop; the sound of continuous dripping.

Chinese definition: 倒來倒去不斷重複。
English Definition: Pouring back and forth repeatedly; inverting something over and over.

Chinese definition: （容器）水分很多，快要瀉出來。
English Definition: (Of a container) very full of liquid; about to overflow.

Chinese definition: 不斷地說話，讓別人覺得煩厭。
English Definition: Talking endlessly in a way that irritates others; droning on and on.

Chinese definition: 很多蛆蟲萬頭鑚動的樣子。
English Definition: Maggots swarming in great numbers.

Chinese definition: 頭髮或者植被很亂。
English Definition: Hair or vegetation extremely disheveled or unkempt.

Chinese definition: 很多絲狀的東西。
English Definition: Full of thin fibres or fine strands.

Chinese definition: 有條狀的東西在運送的時候，或者在風中搖來搖去。
English Definition: (Of long thin objects) swaying and swinging when carried, or in the wind.

Chinese definition: 淹水或者滿地是水的狀態。 二維碼12 【12】四字熟語·對稱結構·A’A’AA
English Definition: Flooded; water covering the ground everywhere.
